title: Untitled
content: Events Staff Training Program (STP) on "LibraOffice Suit Writer, Math , Cal & Impress" : 8th - 28th June, 2017 Inauguration of FOSS Inauguration of Spoken Tutorial SPOKEN TUTORIAL FOSS CENTER EVENT NO:- 1 Title: Inaugural function of Open Source Lab under Spoken Tutorial. Venue: Computer Lab -8 , CSE & IT Dept., JUIT, Solan Time: 4:30 pm Staff Co-coordinator: Prof. Dr S.P. Ghrera Student coordinators Mr. Punit Gupta Event Conducted Under: Spoken Tutorial Activity Type: Co curricular Target Group: All staff and students Outcome of Program 1.Students and staff realized importance of Free Open Source available. 2.Open source lab CL-9 is developed with Mint 17.1 and ready with open sources like Latex , Java, C and C++ etc. Brief Summary about Activity: Inaugural function of Open Source Lab was organized under the guidance of Prof Dr. S.P. Ghrera ( Head Dept. of CSE & IT). All faculty staff from department of computer science and Department of information technology was present including our technical staff from CSE Department. Prof. Ghrera inaugurated the FOSS lab and presented ppt presentation which was sent by her. Ms. Anita Kedare (Training Coordinator - Himachal Pradesh Spoken Tutorial Project-IIT Bombay) shared useful information related to FOSS(Free Open Source Software) and encouraged to use it, through her ppts. Prof. Ghrera also gave brief introduction and achievement of computer science department in collaboration with Spoken Tutorial Project by IIT Bombay in last few sessions. PDF file of the Event Report on Upgradation of Jaypee University of Information Technology as Spoken-Tutorial Foss Resource Centre Photographs of Activity:
